duas.title: Munajat Shabaniyah
duas.description:
Imam `Ali Amir al-Mu'minin and the Holy Imams (peace be upon them) who used to recite it in the month of Shaban.” It is advisable to recite it with presence of heart all the time.
It is recommended to say the following whispered prayer (munajat) that has been narrated by Ibn Khalawayh who commented on it, saying, “This is the confidential prayer of Imam `Ali Amir al-Mu'minin and the Holy Imams (peace be upon them) who used to recite it in the month of Shaban.” It is advisable to recite it with presence of heart all the time. The late Mirza Agha Maliki Tabrizi, one of the teachers of Imam Khomeini, especially in the fields of ethics and spirituality, says that Munajat Sha‘baniyyah contains a wealth of knowledge and the etiquettes and manners of beseeching Allah, and how one can pray and ask for forgiveness from Him.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَٱسْمَعْ دُعَائِي إِذَا دَعَوْتُكَ
segments.transliteration: wasma` du`a'i idha da`awtuka
segments.translation: You listen to my supplication whenever I pray to you,

segments.arabic: وَٱسْمَعْ نِدَائِي إِذَا نَادَيْتُكَ
segments.transliteration: wasma` nida'i idha nadaytuka
segments.translation: listen to my call whenever I call upon you,

segments.arabic: وَأَقْبِلْ عَلَيَّ إِذَا نَاجَيْتُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aqbil `alayya idha najaytuka
segments.translation: and accept from me whenever I make my submission to you in confidence,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ هَرَبْتُ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: faqad harabtu ilayka
segments.translation: I have escaped towards you and stood before you,

segments.arabic: وَوَقَفْتُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ مُسْتَكِيناً لَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa waqaftu bayna yadayka mustakinan laka
segments.translation: standing before You, showing submission to You,

segments.arabic: مُتَضَرِّعاً إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: mutadarri`an ilayka
segments.translation: imploring You,

segments.arabic: رَاجِياً لِمَا لَدَيْكَ ثَوَابِي
segments.transliteration: rajiyan lima ladayka thawabi
segments.translation: and hoping for the reward that You have for me.

segments.arabic: وَتَعْلَمُ مَا فِي نَفْسِي
segments.transliteration: wa ta`lamu ma fi nafsi
segments.translation: You know what is in my inner self,

segments.arabic: وَتَخْبُرُ حَاجَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa takhburu hajati
segments.translation: and you are aware of my needs,

segments.arabic: وَتَعْرِفُ ضَمِيرِي
segments.transliteration: wa ta`rifu damiri
segments.translation: and You know what is in my conscience,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَخْفَىٰ عَلَيْكَ أَمْرُ مُنْقَلَبِي وَمَثْوَايَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yakhfa `alayka amru munqalabi wa mathwaya
segments.translation: and all my moves and stillness are known by You.

segments.arabic: وَمَا أُرِيدُ أَنْ أُبْدِئَ بِهِ مِنْ مَنْطِقِي
segments.transliteration: wa ma uridu an ubdi'a bihi min mantiqi
segments.translation: So are all the utterances which I want to begin with,

segments.arabic: وَأَتَفَوَّهَ بِهِ مِنْ طَلِبَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa atafawwaha bihi min talibati
segments.translation: all the requests that I want to express,

segments.arabic: وَأَرْجُوهُ لِعَاقِبَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa arjuhu li`aqibati
segments.translation: and all the expectation that I hope for my future.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ جَرَتْ مَقَادِيرُكَ عَلَيَّ يَا سَيِّدِي
segments.transliteration: wa qad jarat maqadiruka `alayya ya sayyidi
segments.translation: O my Master, all Your decsions in relation to me have come to pass

segments.arabic: فِيمَا يَكُونُ مِنِّي إِلَىٰ آخِرِ عُمْرِي
segments.transliteration: fima yakunu minni ila akhiri `umri
segments.translation: in all that happens to me up to the end of my life,

segments.arabic: مِنْ سَرِيرَتِي وَعَلانِيَتِي
segments.transliteration: min sarirati wa `alaniyati
segments.translation: including my secret and open matters, shall be experienced by me.

segments.arabic: وَبِيَدِكَ لاَ بِيَدِ غَيْرِكَ زِيَادَتِي وَنَقْصِي
segments.transliteration: wa biyadika la biyadi ghayrika ziyadati wa naqsi
segments.translation: And it is in Your hands, not anybody else’s, that are all my gains and losses

segments.arabic: وَنَفْعِي وَضَرِّي
segments.transliteration: wa naf`i wa darri
segments.translation: and all the benefits and harms that come upon me.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ حَرَمْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَرْزُقُنِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi in haramtani faman dha alladhi yarzuquni
segments.translation: My Lord, if You deprive me (of Your sustenance), then who else can ever provide me with sustenance?

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ خَذَلْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا ٱلَّذِي يَنْصُرُنِي
segments.transliteration: wa in khadhaltani faman dha alladhi yansuruni
segments.translation: If You forsake me, then who else will help me?

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَضَبِكَ وَحُلُولِ سَخَطِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi a`udhu bika min ghadabika wa hululi sakhatika
segments.translation: My Lord, I do seek Your protection against Your wrath and earning your displeasure.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كُنْتُ غَيْرَ مُسْتَأْهِلٍ لِرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kuntu ghayra musta'hilin lirahmatika
segments.translation: O my Lord, if I am not deserving of Your mercy,

segments.arabic: فَأَنْتَ أَهْلٌ أَنْ تَجُودَ عَلَيَّ بِفَضْلِ سَعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa-anta ahlun an tajuda `alayya bifadli sa`atika
segments.translation: You are certainly fit to be generous to me by virtue of your magnanimity.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَأَنِّي بِنَفْسِي وَاقِفَةٌ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi ka-anni binafsi waqifatun bayna yadayka
segments.translation: My Lord, its like I see myself standing before You

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ أَظَلَّهَا حُسْنُ تَوَكُّلِي عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa qad azallaha husnu tawakkuli `alayka
segments.translation: It has been shaded by the goodness of my trust in you,

segments.arabic: فَقُلْتَ مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ وَتَغَمَّدْتَنِي بِعَفْوِكَ
segments.transliteration: faqulta ma anta ahluhu wa taghammadtani bi`afwika
segments.translation: You said what befitted You and sheltered me with your forgiveness.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ عَفَوْتَ فَمَنْ أَوْلَىٰ مِنْكَ بِذٰلِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in `afawta faman awla minka bidhalika
segments.translation: My Lord, if you pardon me, then who else is worthier than You are in pardoning.

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ كَانَ قَدْ دَنَا أَجَلِي وَلَمْ يُدْنِنِي مِنْكَ عَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa in kana qad dana ajali wa lam yudnini minka `amali
segments.translation: If my time of death is near and my deeds have not brought me close to You

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ جَعَلْتُ ٱلإِقْرَارَ بِٱلذَّنْبِ إِلَيْكَ وَسِيلَتِي
segments.transliteration: faqad ja`altu al-iqrara bildhdhanbi ilayka wasilati
segments.translation: I make this confession of my sins to be a means of approaching You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي قَدْ جُرْتُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي فِي ٱلنَّظَرِ لَهَا
segments.transliteration: ilahi qad jurtu `ala nafsi fi alnnazari laha
segments.translation: My Lord, I have been unjust to my soul for I have not looked after it;

segments.arabic: فَلَهَا ٱلْوَيْلُ إِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لَهَا
segments.transliteration: falaha alwaylu in lam taghfir laha
segments.translation: It will be doomed if You do not forgive me.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَمْ يَزَلْ بِرُّكَ عَلَيَّ أَيَّامَ حَيَاتِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi lam yazal birruka `alayya ayyama hayati
segments.translation: My Lord, You have never ceased Your favors from me all my lifetime;

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَقْطَعْ بِرَّكَ عَنِّي فِي مَمَاتِي
segments.transliteration: fala taqta` birraka `anni fi mamati
segments.translation: So do not cease Your goodness towards me at the time of my death.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَيفَ آيَسُ مِنْ حُسْنِ نَظَرِكَ لِي بَعْدَ مَمَاتِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi kayfa ayasu min husni nazarika li ba`da mamati
segments.translation: My Lord, how can I despair of Your benevolent attention towards me after my death

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ لَمْ تُوَلِّنِي إِلاَّ ٱلْجَمِيلَ فِي حَيَاتِي
segments.transliteration: wa anta lam tuwallini illa aljamila fi hayati
segments.translation: while You have always been good to me throughout my lifetime?

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي تَوَلَّ مِنْ أَمْرِي مَا أَنْتَ أَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: ilahi tawalla min amri ma anta ahluhu
segments.translation: My Lord, (please) manage my affairs in the very way that befits You,

segments.arabic: وَعُدْ عَلَيَّ بِفَضْلِكَ عَلَىٰ مُذْنِبٍ قَدْ غَمَرَهُ جَهْلُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa `ud `alayya bifadlika `ala mudhnibin qad ghamarahu jahluhu
segments.translation: and confer upon me—a sinful person who is covered by his ignorance—with Your favors.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي قَدْ سَتَرْتَ عَلَيَّ ذُنُوباً فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: ilahi qad satarta `alayya dhunuban fi alddunya
segments.translation: My Lord, You have concealed my sins in this world,

segments.arabic: وَأَنَا أَحْوَجُ إِلَىٰ سَتْرِهَا عَلَيَّ مِنْكَ فِي ٱلأُخْرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa ana ahwaju ila satriha `alayya minka fi al-ukhra
segments.translation: but I am in greater need of their being concealed in the Next Life.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِى قَدْ أَحْسَنْتَ إِلَىَّ إِذْ لَمْ تُظْهِرْها لِأَحَدٍ مِنْ عِبادِكَ الصَّالِحِينَ
segments.transliteration: Ilahee qad ahsanta ilayya idh lam tudhhirha li-ahadin min `ibadika alssalihina
segments.translation: My Allah, You have been gracious to me by not revealing it to any of Your righteous servants,

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَفْضَحْنِي يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ عَلَىٰ رُؤُوسِ ٱلْأَشْهَادِ
segments.transliteration: fala tafdahni yawma alqiyamati `ala ru'usi al-ashhadi
segments.translation: so do not disgrace me on the Day of Resurrection before the witnesses.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي جُودُكَ بَسَطَ أَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi juduka basata amali
segments.translation: My Lord, it is Your magnanimity that expanded my hope,

segments.arabic: وَعَفْوُكَ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ عَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa `afwuka afdalu min `amali
segments.translation: and surely Your pardon is superior to my deeds.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي فَسُرَّنِي بِلِقَائِكَ يَوْمَ تَقْضِي فِيهِ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi fasurrani biliqa'ika yawma taqdi fihi bayna `ibadika
segments.translation: My Lord, therefore gladden my heart when I meet You on the day when You shall judge between Your servants.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي ٱعْتِذَارِي إِلَيْكَ ٱعْتِذَارُ مَنْ لَمْ يَسْتَغْنِ عَنْ قَبُولِ عُذْرِهِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi i`tidhari ilayka i`tidharu man lam yastaghni `an qabuli `udhrihi
segments.translation: My Lord, I submit to You the apology of one who cannot dispense with the acceptance of his excuse;

segments.arabic: فَٱقْبَلْ عُذْرِي يَا أَكْرَمَ مَنِ ٱعْتَذَرَ إِلَيْهِ ٱلْمُسِيئُونَ
segments.transliteration: faqbal `udhri ya akrama man i`tadhara ilayhi almusi'una
segments.translation: so, (please) accept my excuse, O most Magnanimous of all those before whom the guilty make an apology.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لاَ تَرُدَّ حَاجَتِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi la tarudda hajati
segments.translation: My Lord, (please) do not reject my request,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُخَيِّبْ طَمَعِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tukhayyib tama`i
segments.translation: do not dissapoint my hope for You,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَقْطَعْ مِنْكَ رَجَائِي وَأَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: wa la taqta` minka raja'i wa amali
segments.translation: and do not cut off from You my hope and expectations from You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَوْ أَرَدْتَ هَوَانِي لَمْ تَهْدِنِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi law aradta hawani lam tahdini
segments.translation: My Lord, had You wanted to humiliate me, You would not have guided me (to You).

segments.arabic: وَلَوْ أَرَدْتَ فَضِيحَتِي لَمْ تُعَافِنِي
segments.transliteration: wa law aradta fadihati lam tu`afini
segments.translation: Had You decided to humiliate me,You would not have excused me.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي مَا أَظُنُّكَ تَرُدُّنِي فِي حَاجَةٍ قَدْ أَفْنَيْتُ عُمْرِي فِي طَلَبِهَا مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi ma azunnuka tarudduni fi hajatin qad afnaytu `umri fi talabiha minka
segments.translation: My Lord, I do not expect You to reject my request that I spent my whole lifetime asking for it from You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي فَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ أَبَداً أَبَداً دَائِماً سَرْمَداً
segments.transliteration: ilahi falaka alhamdu abadan abadan da'iman sarmadan
segments.translation: My Lord, all praise be to You, forever, forever, perpetually, everlastingly,

segments.arabic: يَزِيدُ وَلاَ يَبِيدُ كَمَا تُحِبُّ وَتَرْضَىٰ
segments.transliteration: yazidu wa la yabidu kama tuhibbu wa tarda
segments.translation: increasingly, and imperishably, as exactly as You like and please.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ أَخَذْتَنِي بِجُرْمِي أَخَذْتُكَ بِعَفْوِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in akhadhtani bijurmi akhadhtuka bi`afwika
segments.translation: My Lord, if You punish me for my offense, I shall cling to Your pardon,

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ أَخَذْتَنِي بِذُنُوبِي أَخَذْتُكَ بِمَغْفِرَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa in akhadhtani bidhunubi akhadhtuka bimaghfiratika
segments.translation: if You cease me for my sins, I shall take hold of Your forgiveness,

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ أَدْخَلْتَنِي ٱلنَّارَ أَعْلَمْتُ أَهْلَهَا أَنِّي أُحِبُّكَ
segments.transliteration: wa in adkhaltani alnnara a`lamtu ahlaha anni uhibbuka
segments.translation: and if You put me to the fire, I shall declare to its inmates that I love You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كَانَ صَغُرَ فِي جَنْبِ طَاعَتِكَ عَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kana saghura fi janbi ta`atika `amali
segments.translation: My Lord, should my deeds be insignificant with respect to obedience to You,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ كَبُرَ فِي جَنْبِ رَجَائِكَ أَمَلِي
segments.transliteration: faqad kabura fi janbi raja'ika amali
segments.translation: Great indeed is my hope with respect to my expectations from You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي كَيْفَ أَنْقَلِبُ مِنْ عِنْدِكَ بِٱلْخَيْبَةِ مَحْرُوماً
segments.transliteration: ilahi kayfa anqalibu min `indika bilkhaybati mahruman
segments.translation: My Lord, how can it be that I return from You with disappointment and deprivation

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ كَانَ حُسْنُ ظَنِّي بِجُودِكَ أَنْ تَقْلِبَنِي بِٱلنَّجَاةِ مَرْحُوماً
segments.transliteration: wa qad kana husnu zanni bijudika an taqlibani bilnnajati marhuman
segments.translation: for indeed my beautiful opinion about Your generosity was that You shall reverse my fate by savng me mercifully.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَقَدْ أَفْنَيْتُ عُمْرِي فِي شِرَّةِ ٱلسَّهْوِ عَنْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa qad afnaytu `umri fi shirrati alssahwi `anka
segments.translation: My Lord, I have spent my entire lifetime in being negligent to You

segments.arabic: وَأَبْلَيْتُ شَبَابِي فِي سَكْرَةِ ٱلتَّبَاعُدِ مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa ablaytu shababi fi sakrati alttaba`udi minka
segments.translation: and I have spent my whole youth with the stupor of being distant from You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي فَلَمْ أَسْتَيْقِظْ أَيَّامَ ٱغْتِرَارِي بِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi falam astayqiz ayyama ightirari bika
segments.translation: My Lord, I did not wake up from my delusions

segments.arabic: وَرُكُونِي إِلَىٰ سَبِيلِ سَخَطِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa rukuni ila sabili sakhatika
segments.translation: and did not desist from pursuing the path of Your displeasure.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ وَٱبْنُ عَبْدِكَ قَائِمٌ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa ana `abduka wabnu `abdika qa'imun bayna yadayka
segments.translation: My Lord, nevertheless, I am—Your servant and the son of Your servant,now standing before You

segments.arabic: مُتَوَسِّلٌ بِكَرَمِكَ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: mutawassilun bikaramika ilayka
segments.translation: and begging You in the name of Your generosity.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَنَا عَبْدٌ أَتَنَصَّلُ إِلَيْكَ مِمَّا كُنْتُ أُوَاجِهُكَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi ana `abdun atanassalu ilayka mimma kuntu uwajihuka bihi
segments.translation: My Lord, I am a servant, disavowing before You

segments.arabic: مِنْ قِلَّةِ ٱسْتِحْيَائِي مِنْ نَظَرِكَ
segments.transliteration: min qillati istihya'i min nazarika
segments.translation: of my past attitude of lack of shame in Your sight

segments.arabic: وَأَطْلُبُ ٱلْعَفْوَ مِنْكَ إِذ ِٱلْعَفْوُ نَعْتٌ لِكَرَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa atlubu al`afwa minka idh al`afwu na`tun likaramika
segments.translation: seek Your pardon as it is the attribute of Your magnanimty to pardon;

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَمْ يَكُنْ لِي حَوْلٌ فَأَنْتَقِلَ بِهِ عَنْ مَعْصِيَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi lam yakun li hawlun fa-antaqila bihi `an ma`siyatika
segments.translation: My Lord, I had no strength to desist from Your disobedience

segments.arabic: إِلاَّ فِي وَقْتٍ أَيْقَظْتَنِي لِمَحَبَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: illa fi waqtin ayqaztani limahabbatika
segments.translation: except when You awakened me for Your love

segments.arabic: وَكَمَا أَرَدْتَ أَنْ أَكُونَ كُنْتُ
segments.transliteration: wa kama aradta an akuna kuntu
segments.translation: Hence, I desired, that I become exactly as You want me to be.

segments.arabic: فَشَكَرْتُكَ بِإِدْخَالِي فِي كَرَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: fashakartuka bi-idkhali fi karamika
segments.translation: I have thus thanked You, for You admitting me into Your generosity

segments.arabic: وَلِتَطْهِيرِ قَلْبِي مِنْ أَوْسَاخِ ٱلْغَفْلَةِ عَنْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa litathiri qalbi min awsakhi alghaflati `anka
segments.translation: and You have purified my heart from the filth of being inattentive to You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي ٱنْظُرْ إِلَيَّ نَظَرَ مَنْ نَادَيْتَهُ فَأَجَابَكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi unzur ilayya nazara man nadaytahu fa-ajabaka
segments.translation: My Lord, (please) look upon me in the same way as You have looked at one whom You called and he has responded to You

segments.arabic: وَٱسْتَعْمَلْتَهُ بِمَعُونَتِكَ فَأَطَاعَكَ
segments.transliteration: wasta`maltahu bima`unatika fa-ata`aka
segments.translation: and whom You used him in Your service with Your aid and so he obeys You.

segments.arabic: يَا قَرِيباً لاَ يَبْعُدُ عَنِ ٱلْمُغْتَرِّ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: ya qariban la yab`udu `an almughtarri bihi
segments.translation: O the Near one who is not far away from those who love Him ardently

segments.arabic: وَيَا جَوَاداً لاَ يَبْخَلُ عَمَّنْ رَجَا ثَوَابَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa ya jawadan la yabkhalu `amman raja thawabahu
segments.translation: O He Who is too magnanimous to deprive one who hopes for His reward!

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي هَبْ لِي قَلْباً يُدْنِيهِ مِنْكَ شَوْقُهُ
segments.transliteration: ilahi hab li qalban yudnihi minka shawquhu
segments.translation: My Lord, (please) grant me a heart whose longing for You will draw one close to You,

segments.arabic: وَلِسَاناً يُرْفَعُ إِلَيْكَ صِدْقُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa lisanan yurfa`u ilayka sidquhu
segments.translation: a tongue whose truthfulness ascends towards You,

segments.arabic: وَنَظَراً يُقَرِّبُهُ مِنْكَ حَقُّهُ
segments.transliteration: wa nazaran yuqarribuhu minka haqquhu
segments.translation: and a sight whose trueness brings it close to You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنَّ مَنْ تَعَرَّفَ بِكَ غَيْرُ مَجْهُولٍ
segments.transliteration: ilahi inna man ta`arrafa bika ghayru majhulin
segments.translation: My Lord, certainly he who recognizes You shall never be anonymous,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ لاَذَ بِكَ غَيْرُ مَخْذُولٍ
segments.transliteration: wa man ladha bika ghayru makhdhulin
segments.translation: he who seeks Your shelter shall never be disappointed,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ أَقْبَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ غَيْرُ مَمْلُولٍ
segments.transliteration: wa man aqbalta `alayhi ghayru mamlulin
segments.translation: and he to whom You turn to does not fall victim to servility(dejection).

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنَّ مَنِ ٱنْتَهَجَ بِكَ لَمُسْتَنِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: ilahi inna man intahaja bika lamustanirun
segments.translation: My Lord, certainly he who abides by Your Path shall be enlightened,

segments.arabic: وَإِنَّ مَنِ ٱعْتَصَمَ بِكَ لَمُسْتَجِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: wa inna man i`tasama bika lamustajirun
segments.translation: and he who resorts in You finds refuge.

segments.arabic: وَقَدْ لُذْتُ بِكَ يَا إِلٰهِي فَلاَ تُخَيِّبْ ظَنِّي مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa qad ludhtu bika ya ilahi fala tukhayyib zanni min rahmatika
segments.translation: Indeed certainly I have taken shelter in You, My Lord! So, (please) do not let down my opinion in Your mercy

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَحْجُبْنِي عَنْ رَأْفَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la tahjubni `an ra'fatika
segments.translation: and do not exclude me from Your compassion.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَقِمْنِي فِي أَهْلِ وِلايَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi aqimni fi ahli wilayatika
segments.translation: My Lord, place me, among those who show servitude to You,

segments.arabic: مُقَامَ مَنْ رَجَا ٱلزِّيَادَةَ مِنْ مَحَبَّتِكَ
segments.transliteration: muqama man raja alzziyadata min mahabbatika
segments.translation: the position of those who (incessantly) hope to increase Your love.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَأَلْهِمْنِي وَلَهاً بِذِكْرِكَ إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa alhimni walahan bidhikrika ila dhikrika
segments.translation: My Lord, (please) inspire me with a mounting passion for Your rememberance,

segments.arabic: وَهِمَّتِي فِي رَوْحِ نَجَاحِ أَسْمَائِكَ وَمَحَلِّ قُدْسِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa himmati fi rawhi najahi asma'ika wa mahalli qudsika
segments.translation: and (please) with an ardour for the refreshing resort to Your names and the station of Your Holiness.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي بِكَ عَلَيْكَ إِلاَّ أَلْحَقْتَنِي بِمَحَلِّ أَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi bika `alayka illa alhaqtani bimahalli ahli ta`atika
segments.translation: My Lord, I beseech You in Your name to put me in the abode of those who are obedient to You

segments.arabic: وَٱلْمَثْوَىٰ ٱلصَّالِحِ مِنْ مَرْضَاتِكَ
segments.transliteration: walmathwa alssalihi min mardatika
segments.translation: and to the righteous sanctuary of Your good pleasure,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي لاَ أَقْدِرُ لِنَفْسِي دَفْعاً
segments.transliteration: fa'inni la aqdiru linafsi daf`an
segments.translation: for I,certainly I have no power to repel any harm

segments.arabic: وَلاَ أَمْلِكُ لَهَا نَفْعاً
segments.transliteration: wa la amliku laha naf`an
segments.translation: nor to obtain any benefit for it.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي أَنَا عَبْدُكَ ٱلضَّعِيفُ ٱلْمُذْنِبُ
segments.transliteration: ilahi ana `abduka aldda`ifu almudhnibu
segments.translation: My Lord, I am Your weak and sinful servant—

segments.arabic: وَمَمْلُوكُكَ ٱلْمُنِيبُ
segments.transliteration: wa mamlukuka almunibu
segments.translation: and Your repenting slave.

segments.arabic: فَلاَ تَجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ صَرَفْتَ عَنْهُ وَجْهَكَ
segments.transliteration: fala taj`alni mimman sarafta `anhu wajhaka
segments.translation: So, (please) do not include me amongst those from whom You have turned away Your face

segments.arabic: وَحَجَبَهُ سَهْوُهُ عَنْ عَفْوِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa hajabahu sahwuhu `an `afwika
segments.translation: and those who are excluded from Your pardon because of their lapses.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي هَبْ لي كَمَالَ ٱلاِنْقِطَاعِ إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi hab li kamala alinqita`i ilayka
segments.translation: My Lord, (please) grant me absolute devotion to You

segments.arabic: وَأَنِرْ أَبْصَارَ قُلُوبِنَا بِضِيَاءِ نَظَرِهَا إِلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: wa anir absara qulubina bidiya'i nazariha ilayka
segments.translation: and illumine the vision of our hearts by the light of their gaze looking towards You

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تَخْرِقَ أَبْصَارُ ٱلْقُلُوبِ حُجُبَ ٱلنُّورِ
segments.transliteration: hatta takhriqa absaru alqulubi hujuba alnnuri
segments.translation: until the vision of our hearts pierces the curtains of light

segments.arabic: فَتَصِلَ إِلَىٰ مَعْدِنِ ٱلْعَظَمَةِ
segments.transliteration: fatasila ila ma`dini al`azamati
segments.translation: to reach the core of supremacy,

segments.arabic: وَتَصِيرَ أَرْوَاحُنَا مُعَلَّقَةً بِعِزِّ قُدْسِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa tasira arwahuna mu`allaqatan bi`izzi qudsika
segments.translation: and that our souls become suspended by the majesty of Your Holiness.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَٱجْعَلْنِي مِمَّنْ نَادَيْتَهُ فَأَجَابَكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi waj`alni mimman nadaytahu fa-ajabaka
segments.translation: My Lord, (please) appoint me of those who responded to You when You called them,

segments.arabic: وَلاحَظْتَهُ فَصَعِقَ لِجَلالِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lahaztahu fasa`iqa lijalalika
segments.translation: and at whom You glanced so he swoons before Your Majesty

segments.arabic: فَنَاجَيْتَهُ سِرّاً وَعَمِلَ لَكَ جَهْراً
segments.transliteration: fanajaytahu sirran wa `amila laka jahran
segments.translation: So You speak to him secretly and he works for You openly.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي لَمْ أُسَلِّطْ عَلَىٰ حُسْنِ ظَنِّي قُنُوطَ ٱلأَيَاسِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi lam usallit `ala husni zanni qunuta al-ayasi
segments.translation: My Lord, do not let the dejection of despair overshadow my beautiful opinion

segments.arabic: وَلاَ ٱنْقَطَعَ رَجَائِي مِنْ جَمِيلِ كَرَمِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la inqata`a raja'i min jamili karamika
segments.translation: and do not cut my hope from Your generosity

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كَانَتِ ٱلْخَطَايَا قَدْ أَسْقَطَتْنِي لَدَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in kanat alkhataya qad asqatatni ladayka
segments.translation: My Lord, if my lapses have made me to fall from Your grace,

segments.arabic: فَٱصْفَحْ عَنِّي بِحُسْنِ تَوَكُّلِي عَلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: fasfah `anni bihusni tawakkuli `alayka
segments.translation: So please pardon me for the beauty of my reliance upon You.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ حَطَّتْنِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبُ مِنْ مَكَارِمِ لُطْفِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in hattatni aldhdhunubu min makarimi lutfika
segments.translation: My Lord, if my wrongdoings have excluded me from the generosity of Your grace,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ نَبَّهَنِي ٱلْيَقِينُ إِلَىٰ كَرَمِ عَطْفِكَ
segments.transliteration: faqad nabbahani alyaqinu ila karami `atfika
segments.translation: So certainly my conviction reassures me of Your generosity and gentleness.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ أَنَامَتْنِيَ ٱلْغَفْلَةُ عَنِ ٱلإِسْتِعْدَادِ لِلِقَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in anamatni alghaflatu `an alisti`dadi liliqa'ika
segments.translation: My Lord, if my neglect has lulled me into slumber preventing me from preparing myself for my meeting with You,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ نَبَّهَتْنِي ٱلْمَعْرِفَةُ بِكَرَمِ آلاَئِكَ
segments.transliteration: faqad nabbahatni alma`rifatu bikarami ala'ika
segments.translation: So certainly my recognition apprises me of your generous bounties has awakened me.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي إِنْ دَعَانِي إِلَىٰ ٱلنَّارِ عَظِيمُ عِقَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: ilahi in da`ani ila alnnari `azimu `iqabika
segments.translation: My Lord, if Your grave chastisement calls me to the Hellfire,

segments.arabic: فَقَدْ دَعَانِي إِلَىٰ ٱلْجَنَّةِ جَزِيلُ ثَوَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: faqad da`ani ila aljannati jazilu thawabika
segments.translation: So Your plentious reward has called me to Paradise.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي فَلَكَ أَسْأَلُ وَإِلَيْكَ أَبْتَهِلُ وَأَرْغَبُ
segments.transliteration: ilahi falaka as'alu wa ilayka abtahilu wa arghabu
segments.translation: My Lord, so to You I beg and I implore and I request.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: I beseech You to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَنِي مِمَّنْ يُدِيمُ ذِكْرَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa an taj`alani mimman yudimu dhikraka
segments.translation: and to include me with those who always remember You,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَنْقُضُ عَهْدَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yanqudu `ahdaka
segments.translation: and those who never break their promise to You,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَغْفُلُ عَنْ شُكْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yaghfulu `an shukrika
segments.translation: and who do not neglect to thank You,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَسْتَخِفُّ بِأَمْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yastakhiffu bi-amrika
segments.translation: and who never belittle Your commands.

segments.arabic: إِلٰهِي وَأَلْحِقْنِي بِنُورِ عِزِّكَ ٱلأَبْهَجِ
segments.transliteration: ilahi wa alhiqni binuri `izzika al-abhaji
segments.translation: My Lord, (please do) submerge me in the most blissful lights of Your majesty,

segments.arabic: فَأَكُونَ لَكَ عَارِفاً
segments.transliteration: fa-akuna laka `arifan
segments.translation: so that I will recognize You

segments.arabic: وَعَنْ سِوَاكَ مُنْحَرِفاً
segments.transliteration: wa `an siwaka munharifan
segments.translation: and renounce all else except You,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْكَ خَائِفاً مُرَاقِباً
segments.transliteration: wa minka kha'ifan muraqiban
segments.translation: and that I will be fearful of and careful with You.

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا ٱلْجَلاَلِ وَٱلإِكْرَامِ
segments.transliteration: ya dha aljalali wal-ikrami
segments.translation: O Lord of Majesty and Honor!

segments.arabic: وَصَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ رَسُولِهِ وَآلِهِ ٱلطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salla allahu `ala muhammadin rasulihi wa alihi alttahirina
segments.translation: May Allah send blessings to Muhammad, His Messenger, and upon his Household the Infallible,

segments.arabic: وَسَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً كَثِيراً
segments.transliteration: wa sallama tasliman kathiran
segments.translation: and may countless greetings be to them.

duas.title: Translation by Ihyā Academy
duas.content:
In the Name of Allah the Beneficent the Merciful Oh Allah! Send your choicest mercy upon Muhammad and the progeny of Muhammad S. Hear my prayer when I supplicate to you, and Hear my cry when I call out to you And turn towards me when I whisper to you! (as) surely I have come fleeing to you and (now) stand before you (in a state that I am) desperately pleading towards You, beseeching You, (being) hopeful towards what you have rewarding for me, (while) You know what is in my soul and You have news of my need and You are aware of my hidden reality.
And the affairs of my turns and stations are not hidden from You (and likewise) what I want to begin expressing, and bring to utterance in asking, and the hopes for my ultimate culmination (are not hidden from You) And Your Preordained measured capacities for me will transpire, Oh My Master, in what is going to ensue from me till the end of my life, in account of my affairs (both) hidden and apparent, And in Your Hand and not in the hand of other than You, lies the increase, decrease, benefit and harm (in the affairs of my life – hidden and apparent)

My God! If you hold back from me, then who will provide me with sustenance? And if you forsake me, then who will come to my assistance?
My God! I seek Your Protection from Your Wrath, and from becoming eligible for Your Displeasure
My God! If I am not worthy of Your Mercy, You are (indeed) worthy of generosity towards me by the expansiveness of Your Grace.
My God! As if I myself stand in your Presence while my high degree of trust and reliance upon You has shaded me; so You said [did] what You are worthy of, and (thereby) wrapped me in Your Pardon.
My God! If You pardon, then who is more suited than You to do so? And if my death has come near, and my deeds did not yet bring me close to You, then I make this confession of my sins to You a means of approaching You.
My God! I have been unjust upon my soul due to fixation (on base needs) for its sake, and it will certainly be doomed if You do not forgive it.
My God! You have continually been kind to me in my lifetime, so do not cut off Your favour from me at the time of my death.
My God! How can I despair from your good attention towards me after my death, while you have not left me (with anything) but beauty in my lifetime.
My God! Undertake guardianship of my affairs in a way that befits You and return favourably with your Grace towards a sinner whose ignorance has become immersive.
My God! You surely covered my sins in the temporal life, while I am in greater need of Your covering them for me in the Next. (
My God! You acted benevolently towards me) when you did not make them apparent to anyone from Your Virtuous Servants, so do not expose me on the day of Rising, before the faces of onlookers.

My God! Your Generosity has increased my aspiration, and Your Pardon is worthier than my action.
My God! So make me exhilarated by Your Meeting on the day wherein You will judge between Your Servants.
My God! My apology to You is the seeking excuse of someone who cannot afford the non-acceptance of his apology, thus accept my excuse, O the Most Honouring One that the sinners seek excuse from.
My God! Don’t turn my request down, and don’t undermine my yearning, and don’t cut off my hope and aspirations from You.
My God! If You had wanted my disgrace, You would not have guided me, and if You had wanted to expose me, You would not have kept me well.
My God! I don’t reckon You will turn down a request I have expended my whole life in seeking it from You.

My God! To You belongs All Praise, everlastingly, eternally, forever, perpetually, increasing and not diminishing, the way You Love and Please.
My God! If You take me to task for my crimes, I will cling to You by Your Pardon, and if You hold me responsible for my sins, I will cling to You by Your Forgiveness, And if You make me enter Hell, I will announce to its inmates that I surely love You!
My God! If my deeds fall short before (the suitability of) Your Obedience, my aspirations are uplifted due to (the degree of) Hope I hold in You.
My God! How can I turn away from You, failed and denied, while my Good opinion of Your Generosity made me sure of becoming successful and blessed.

My God! I have perished my life in the greed of oblivion (away) from You, and I have decayed my youth in the intoxication of becoming distant from You.
My God! I did not wake up while arrogant towards You and while seeking the path of Your displeasure.
My God! I am your servant, the son of Your servant, standing before You, interceding by means of Your Magnanimity towards You.
My God! I am a servant seeking elimination from You of all what was committed by me in Your Presence unashamedly, with low regard for Your Watch, And I seek Pardon from You, as Pardon is a characteristic of Your Magnanimity.
My God! I did not have the ability (by which) I could move away from Your disobedience, except in moments that You woke me up to Your Love.
And the way you Willed that I be, I was, thus I thanked You for including me in Your Magnanimity, and for purifying my heart from the filth of negligence towards You. My God! Look at me the look of a person who You have called out to, and he answered you, and who You empowered to serve You and he obeyed You.
O the Near who is not away from the one infatuated with Him! O the Generous who does not withhold from the one who hopes for His reward.
My God! Grant me a heart that is drawn near to You by its passion, and a tongue whose truthfulness raises it towards You, and a sight whose authenticity brings it close to You.
My God! Indeed the one who recognizes through You is not unknown, the one who takes shelter in You is not forsaken, and the one who You turn towards is not owned by another (or, is not fatigued). My God! Indeed the one who treads the path through You is surely enlightened, the one who holds onto You has surely sought refuge, and certainly I have sought refuge with You my God! So do not disappoint my notions from Your Mercy, and do not veil me from Your Kindness.
